message:
Integrate Streamdown for glossary entries and war story cards Replaces raw string rendering with the Streamdown component in two locations: - Glossary page: Both the term detail view (long description) and the card grid (short description) now render through Streamdown, enabling Markdown formatting in jargon term definitions. The wrapping elements are changed from

to

to avoid invalid nesting of block-level elements inside paragraphs. - War story cards: The story description and technical details (root cause analysis) fields now render through Streamdown, allowing inline code references, bold emphasis, and other Markdown in war story content. Same

-to-

nesting fix. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6
